title: Siemens Healthineers India is Hiring: Consultant Physician (Principal)

jsonLd.title: Siemens Healthineers India is Hiring: Consultant Physician (Principal)
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Consultant Physician looking for your next big career move? Siemens Healthineers India in Ghaziabad offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Siemens Healthineers India:
Siemens Healthineers India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records
• Collaborate with pharmaceutical representatives and medical suppliers
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention
• Monitor patient progress and adjust treatment plans accordingly
• Adhere to NABH/JCI accreditation standards
• Ensure patient privacy and maintain confidentiality

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Patient Care
• Proficiency in Diagnostic Skills
• Proficiency in Health Informatics
• Proficiency in Wound Care
• Proficiency in Clinical Documentation
• Proficiency in CPT Codes
• Proficiency in Infection Control
• Proficiency in ICD-10

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Life and accident insurance
• Company-sponsored certifications
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Ghaziabad, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Siemens Healthineers India!
